text: Mara Weeks should start with three spreadsheets in a prayer.
Shift works HR takes your compensation census and turns it into a clear list of who needs
attention, what it's going to cost, and what to tell your leadership in under 30 seconds.
You already have the file from Workday, ADP, or a spreadsheet.
Drop it in.
There is no new system that you need to buy.
Nothing for IT to configure.
You're ready to go.
First thing you get is a prioritize review list.
What matters most is at the top, so you're not guessing what to fix before letters go
out.
You also get that money answer.
What is going to cost to bring people up to the range?
What's in the merit pool and your total exposure?
So when finance asks, you have a number.
Every issue comes with a person attached, named, department, and the exact dollar gap.
It's not a vague count.
It's something that you can act on.
It catches the awkward ones too, like a manager earning less than someone that they lead.
You see both sides clearly, so you can handle it before it becomes a conversation that you
weren't ready for.
When leadership asks about pay fairness, you can show medium pay by gender and race and
the gap between groups from your own data, ready for the meeting.
If your file has location, you see how pay looks like by city and where your people sit.
The geographic patterns without building a whole nother spreadsheet.
When you do need to brief executives, one click gives you a summary they'll actually use,
giving you the risk level, total exposure, and the talking points that they're going
to be asking about.
Try Shift Works HR free with your own census.
No credit card required.
